name: tokenpilot_pipeline
description: Estimate, prioritize, and route engineering tickets by AI cost, time, and priority. Replace this skeleton with the real RocketRide pipeline JSON exported from the VS Code builder (see docs.rocketride.org).

nodes.role: Estimate token cost, time, and complexity for each ticket.
nodes.notes: Query XTrace for 'tickets like this (type=X)' BEFORE estimating so numbers are grounded in real history.

nodes.role: Given all estimates + remaining quota + priorities, produce the optimal work ORDER that maximizes priority-weighted work inside budget.
Per ticket, pick model tier by balancing criticality vs. complexity vs. context size.
Maintain a compact running summary per ticket so follow-up work doesn't re-send full history; enables downshift to cheaper model.
Check model output against the context summary for drift/hallucination; flag low-confidence outputs.
